sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28965" key="dusecubwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεξ-ῡβωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28965.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not easily displaced outwards</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.102</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
